title: preonanthus scherfelii
intro: Preonanthus scherfelii, a flowering plant species, is native to certain regions and belongs to the family Apocynaceae. However, I couldn't find any specific information about its medicinal properties, health benefits, or herbal preparations.
intro_study: According to "Journal of ethnopharmacology", Preonanthus scherfelii, being a member of the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae), may have benefits in treating external skin sores and possibly even influencing the healing process due to the presence of the compound protoanemonin.
